Choose one: (a) Content and argument review (concept, logic, evidence, novelty), (b) Structural reorganization, (c) Writing polish (grammar, flow), (d) Citation and scholarship check.","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is centrally expected in assisting with a research paper section to ensure limitations are transparently addressed.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is a central responsibility to prevent exaggerated statements in the technical content.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is expected to keep the assistance focused on the section's topic of iterative refinement stability.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is centrally considered to mitigate any risks from misapplying the analyzed disambiguation techniques.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability are key for maintaining accuracy in references to prior works and mathematical derivations."}}

parsed.clarification_question: What is the primary type of help you need with this section? Choose one: (a) Content and argument review (concept, logic, evidence, novelty), (b) Structural reorganization, (c) Writing polish (grammar, flow), (d) Citation and scholarship check.

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is centrally expected in assisting with a research paper section to ensure limitations are transparently addressed.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is a central responsibility to prevent exaggerated statements in the technical content.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is expected to keep the assistance focused on the section's topic of iterative refinement stability.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is centrally considered to mitigate any risks from misapplying the analyzed disambiguation techniques.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are key for maintaining accuracy in references to prior works and mathematical derivations.
